title: paspalum hirsutum
intro: Paspalum hirsutum, also known as hairy paspalum, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Paspalum hirsutum include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Paspalum hirsutum include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
